name: realestate-mcp
description: MCP server for real estate agents — 3D virtual tours, SVG floor plans, AI property descriptions, staging suggestions, neighborhood analysis, and 3D model previews.
author: Thomas Gorisse

tools.name: generate_floor_plan
tools.description: Generate an SVG floor plan from room dimensions and types

tools.name: create_virtual_tour
tools.description: Create an embeddable 3D virtual tour from room descriptions and photos

tools.name: property_description
tools.description: Generate optimized property listing descriptions for MLS, social media, luxury, and investor audiences

tools.name: staging_suggestions
tools.description: Suggest virtual staging options — furniture, decor, lighting, textiles, plants, and art with placement instructions

tools.name: neighborhood_analysis
tools.description: Generate a comprehensive neighborhood summary including walk score, schools, transit, demographics, safety, and market context

tools.name: render_property_preview
tools.description: Generate an embeddable 3D model-viewer HTML snippet with AR support
